short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, low, wide full toss. Driven down the ground and once again the batters will complete the
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, low, wide full toss. Driven down the ground and once again the batters will complete the couple. Nice comeback from Ireland,

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, short outside off, punched down to the left of long off for a couple of runs
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, short outside off, punched down to the left of long off for a couple of runs

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, low full toss on off, driven straight down the ground. A half chance for the bowler but
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, low full toss on off, driven straight down the ground. A half chance for the bowler but that would have come too quickly at him

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, no run, a superb wide yorker. Mitchell can't connect
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, no run, a superb wide yorker. Mitchell can't connect

short_text: Mark Adair to Southee, byes, 1 run, full outside off, a swing and a miss for Southee. The batters scamper for the bye
full_text: Mark Adair to Southee, byes, 1 run, full outside off, a swing and a miss for Southee. The batters scamper for the bye

short_text: Mark Adair to Southee, , Adair tries to bounce out Southee, ends up being well over the helmet
full_text: Mark Adair to Southee, , Adair tries to bounce out Southee, ends up being well over the helmet

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 1 run, thigh high full toss outside off, driven down to the left of extra cover who stops with a
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 1 run, thigh high full toss outside off, driven down to the left of extra cover who stops with a dive

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, pace off and back of a length, turned towards deep square leg to retain strike. What a
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, pace off and back of a length, turned towards deep square leg to retain strike. What an over for Joshua Little, three runs conceded and a memorable World Cup hat-trick!!

short_text: Joshua Little to Southee, 1 run, to point, fuller on off, pushed towards point
full_text: Joshua Little to Southee, 1 run, to point, fuller on off, pushed towards point

short_text: Joshua Little to Santner, Lbw!! The second World Cup hat-trick! Once again a length ball that skids on, hurries the batt
full_text: Joshua Little to Santner, Lbw!! The second World Cup hat-trick! Once again a length ball that skids on, hurries the batter who is late on his stroke. Struck flush on middle with no bat, would have crashed onto middle stump. Santner burns the second review and he too walks back for a first ball duck. A moment to cherish for Joshua Little, the first in the Super 12's!

short_text: Joshua Little to Neesham, Lbw!! The big southpaw goes for a first ball duck! Length ball on off, skids on slightly and s
full_text: Joshua Little to Neesham, Lbw!! The big southpaw goes for a first ball duck! Length ball on off, skids on slightly and surprises Neesham. He's a little late in trying to slog that away on the leg side, and gets struck on the pads. Burns a review but NZ won't be too chuffed with just an over to go.

short_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, Caught by Delany!! End of a fine innings! Short on the body, Williamson decides to take it
full_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, Caught by Delany!! End of a fine innings! Short on the body, Williamson decides to take it on with the pull, dosen't get the desired distance this time and deep backward square leg gets under it to take a regulation catch. The skipper has done his job, now time for Neesham to provide the big finish.

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, length ball that keeps slightly low on off, glanced down to deep square leg
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, length ball that keeps slightly low on off, glanced down to deep square leg

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , once again goes Williamson! Again too full on middle, Williamson totally clobbers this over de
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , once again goes Williamson! Again too full on middle, Williamson totally clobbers this over deep mid-wicket. Deep into the stands she goes.

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , short outside off, Williamson goes chasing after and gets a top edge on his cut that flies awa
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , short outside off, Williamson goes chasing after and gets a top edge on his cut that flies away to the third-man boundary

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , sweet! That's some way to get to 50. Nice half volley on middle, Williamson with a slight shuf
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , sweet! That's some way to get to 50. Nice half volley on middle, Williamson with a slight shuffle closer and then lifts his flick all the way over deep mid-wicket. A shot of pure class from the Kiwi skipper!

short_text: McCarthy to Mitchell, 1 run, short outside off, slapped square of the wicket on the off side
full_text: McCarthy to Mitchell, 1 run, short outside off, slapped square of the wicket on the off side

short_text: McCarthy to Mitchell, 2 runs, dropped!! Thigh high full toss, Mitchell tries to flick it past short fine leg. It is slig
full_text: McCarthy to Mitchell, 2 runs, dropped!! Thigh high full toss, Mitchell tries to flick it past short fine leg. It is slightly to the left of the fielder, but still very catchable. Chance goes begging..

short_text: McCarthy to Mitchell, 2 runs, yorker on off, driven straight down the ground for a couple of runs. Long-on comes across
full_text: McCarthy to Mitchell, 2 runs, yorker on off, driven straight down the ground for a couple of runs. Long-on comes across to stop

short_text: Mark Adair to Williamson, 2 runs, very full on middle and leg, pushed into the pocket between long-on and deep mid-wicke
full_text: Mark Adair to Williamson, 2 runs, very full on middle and leg, pushed into the pocket between long-on and deep mid-wicket to sneak another couple

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 1 run, nice wide yorker from Adair, tapped towards point for a single
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 1 run, nice wide yorker from Adair, tapped towards point for a single

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, another slower ball, this time fuller. Mitchell lifts it over the bowler's head but long
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 2 runs, another slower ball, this time fuller. Mitchell lifts it over the bowler's head but long-on will cut this off

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, , pace off length ball outside off, Mitchell stands tall and lifts his drive over extra cover. W
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, , pace off length ball outside off, Mitchell stands tall and lifts his drive over extra cover. Well struck to beat the dive of the sweeper then and give him a boundary

short_text: Mark Adair to Williamson, 1 run, short on middle and leg, pulled towards deep mid-wicket
full_text: Mark Adair to Williamson, 1 run, short on middle and leg, pulled towards deep mid-wicket

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 1 run, full outside off, sits up nicely for the drive down to long-off. Gives the strike back to
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, 1 run, full outside off, sits up nicely for the drive down to long-off. Gives the strike back to his skipper

short_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, , pace off and full, but very wide outside off. Adair lucky infact that the ball didn't go outsi
full_text: Mark Adair to Mitchell, , pace off and full, but very wide outside off. Adair lucky infact that the ball didn't go outside the pitch

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 2 runs, pitched up outside off, driven wide of long off for a couple of runs. Another fruitful o
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 2 runs, pitched up outside off, driven wide of long off for a couple of runs. Another fruitful over for New Zealand.

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, , short on leg stump, Williamson gets back and pulls in front of square, through cow corner for
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, , short on leg stump, Williamson gets back and pulls in front of square, through cow corner for a boundary. Finding the gaps at ease now!

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 2 runs, fuller outside off, Williamson reaches for it to lift his drive over extra cover. No rea
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 2 runs, fuller outside off, Williamson reaches for it to lift his drive over extra cover. No real timing on that one so just a couple

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, no run, flat on middle, drilled down the ground and it actually hits Mitchell. That'll give the
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, no run, flat on middle, drilled down the ground and it actually hits Mitchell. That'll give the Irish a dot ball

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, , good placement! Flat on the body again, Williamson gets down and plays his sweep late to find
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, , good placement! Flat on the body again, Williamson gets down and plays his sweep late to find the gap behind square for a valuable boundary

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, no run, arm ball onto leg, slapped towards mid-wicket who makes a diving stop
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, no run, arm ball onto leg, slapped towards mid-wicket who makes a diving stop

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, , back of a length and pace off, Mitchell had all the time in the world to find the gap with
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, , back of a length and pace off, Mitchell had all the time in the world to find the gap with his pull behind square. Four to end the over which was going well for the Irish till that point

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, , fuller but very wide outside off, umpire extends his arms
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, , fuller but very wide outside off, umpire extends his arms

short_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length on the body, pulled down to deep square leg
full_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length on the body, pulled down to deep square leg

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, once again pace off and back of a length, driven uppishly towards mid-off. The fielder
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, once again pace off and back of a length, driven uppishly towards mid-off. The fielder takes a shy at the non-striker end and allows an overthrow run

short_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, 1 run, pace off length ball outside off, Williamson waits an eternity to pull it across the
full_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, 1 run, pace off length ball outside off, Williamson waits an eternity to pull it across the line towards deep mid-wicket

short_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, I0$ length ball on middle, tucked towards square leg
full_text: Joshua Little to Mitchell, 1 run, I0$ length ball on middle, tucked towards square leg

short_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length on middle, pulled towards deep mid-wicket
full_text: Joshua Little to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length on middle, pulled towards deep mid-wicket

short_text: Delany to Williamson, 1 run, short on leg stump, pulled along the ground to Harry Tector at deep mid-wicket
full_text: Delany to Williamson, 1 run, short on leg stump, pulled along the ground to Harry Tector at deep mid-wicket

short_text: Delany to Mitchell, 1 run, pushed quicker and full on leg, turned towards deep mid-wicket
full_text: Delany to Mitchell, 1 run, pushed quicker and full on leg, turned towards deep mid-wicket

short_text: Delany to Mitchell, no run, flat and looked like the googly. Mitchell stepped out but has to adjust and defend
full_text: Delany to Mitchell, no run, flat and looked like the googly. Mitchell stepped out but has to adjust and defend

short_text: Delany to Mitchell, 2 runs, flat on off, Mitchell shuffles closer to ramp it over short fine where there is no fielder.
full_text: Delany to Mitchell, 2 runs, flat on off, Mitchell shuffles closer to ramp it over short fine where there is no fielder. Deep backward square leg cuts it off as the Kiwi batter gets off the mark

short_text: Delany to Mitchell, no run, pitched up on middle, straight up Mitchell attempts the reverse sweep but picks out backward
full_text: Delany to Mitchell, no run, pitched up on middle, straight up Mitchell attempts the reverse sweep but picks out backward point

short_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, Caught by Dockrell!! Delany strikes again and this time it is the man in form! Full and wide o
full_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, Caught by Dockrell!! Delany strikes again and this time it is the man in form! Full and wide outside off, Phillips slashes hard at it but this time picks out the fielder at deep extra cover. Dockrell the man who comes in a couple of paces to take a well judged catch. It was flat and would have come quickly towards him. The Glenn Phillips shows ends quickly today.

short_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, pitched up on middle, Phillips drives down to long-on for a single
full_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, pitched up on middle, Phillips drives down to long-on for a single

short_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, , short of length around middle, tries cramping Phillips for room but there's no stopping hi
full_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, , short of length around middle, tries cramping Phillips for room but there's no stopping him as he pulls it in between long-on and deep midwicket

short_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, , slower length ball outside off, and Phillips continues to time it sweetly as he whacks it
full_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, , slower length ball outside off, and Phillips continues to time it sweetly as he whacks it over extra cover for four more

short_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, no run, short of length outside off, steered to backward point
full_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, no run, short of length outside off, steered to backward point

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length around off, Williamson tucks it through midwicket
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length around off, Williamson tucks it through midwicket

short_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, overpitched outside off, Phillips drives to sweeper cover
full_text: McCarthy to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, overpitched outside off, Phillips drives to sweeper cover

short_text: Delany to Williamson, no run, defends this googly to midwicket
full_text: Delany to Williamson, no run, defends this googly to midwicket

short_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Phillips punches down to long-on
full_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Phillips punches down to long-on

short_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, , wow! Just his second ball and Phillips nails it for six! And the length here isn't even idea
full_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, , wow! Just his second ball and Phillips nails it for six! And the length here isn't even ideal for the slog-sweep, it's very full around leg stump but Phillips has still managed to smoke it over square leg. Just shows the form he is in

short_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, no run, length ball on middle, Phillips defends down the pitch
full_text: Delany to Glenn Phillips, no run, length ball on middle, Phillips defends down the pitch

short_text: Delany to Conway, Caught by Mark Adair!! Goes for the slog-sweep but the problem for Conway is that he's looking to fetc
full_text: Delany to Conway, Caught by Mark Adair!! Goes for the slog-sweep but the problem for Conway is that he's looking to fetch it from very wide outside off. And on top of that, it's a googly. He gets it right off the bottom of his bat and miscues it in the air to long-on. Simple catch for Adair. Ireland spinners have been wide to Conway the whole time and the plan pays off here.

short_text: Delany to Conway, 2 runs, good length delivery wide of off, Conway throws his hands at it and gets a thick edge that bal
full_text: Delany to Conway, 2 runs, good length delivery wide of off, Conway throws his hands at it and gets a thick edge that balloons over short third

short_text: Delany to Conway, , way too wide outside off, left alone
full_text: Delany to Conway, , way too wide outside off, left alone

short_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, , pulled away for six! 18 off the over as Williamson and New Zealand get a move on! This is sh
full_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, , pulled away for six! 18 off the over as Williamson and New Zealand get a move on! This is short into the body, and Williamson swivels into position nicely before smashing it behind square and into the crowd

short_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, , Williamson shimmies down the track, gets a full delivery and manages to loft it over mid-off
full_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, , Williamson shimmies down the track, gets a full delivery and manages to loft it over mid-off. Nearly goes all the way

short_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 1 run, driven through to sweeper cover
full_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 1 run, driven through to sweeper cover

short_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, , short of length around the chest and it's been crunched! Conway is nicely on top of the bounce t
full_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, , short of length around the chest and it's been crunched! Conway is nicely on top of the bounce to pull it away through midwicket

short_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 2 runs, ! It's pitched up outside off, Conway looks to drive but gets it off the inside half. Has
full_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 2 runs, ! It's pitched up outside off, Conway looks to drive but gets it off the inside half. Has fallen so far in front of the fielder that they get back for two

short_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, 1 run, short of length around off, Williamson steers it to third man
full_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, 1 run, short of length around off, Williamson steers it to third man

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 1 run, fired into the pads, Williamson clips it for a single through midwicket
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 1 run, fired into the pads, Williamson clips it for a single through midwicket

short_text: Dockrell to Conway, 1 run, good length delivery fired across off, Conway cuts to sweeper cover
full_text: Dockrell to Conway, 1 run, good length delivery fired across off, Conway cuts to sweeper cover

short_text: Dockrell to Conway, , another wide outside off as Dockrell tries to stay clear of the slog-sweep
full_text: Dockrell to Conway, , another wide outside off as Dockrell tries to stay clear of the slog-sweep

short_text: Dockrell to Conway, no run, full outside off, Conway goes too hard on the drive and mistimes it back to Dockrell off the
full_text: Dockrell to Conway, no run, full outside off, Conway goes too hard on the drive and mistimes it back to Dockrell off the inside half

short_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length on off, Williamson pulls it hard to the right of long-on and thinks abou
full_text: Dockrell to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length on off, Williamson pulls it hard to the right of long-on and thinks about two. But decides against it

short_text: Dockrell to Conway, 1 run, fetches the slog-sweep from outside off and mistimes it wide of deep midwicket
full_text: Dockrell to Conway, 1 run, fetches the slog-sweep from outside off and mistimes it wide of deep midwicket

short_text: Dockrell to Conway, , this time it is definitely a wide as he slants it too far away from round the wicket
full_text: Dockrell to Conway, , this time it is definitely a wide as he slants it too far away from round the wicket

short_text: Dockrell to Conway, no run, left alone outside off expecting a wide, but Dockrell gets away with it
full_text: Dockrell to Conway, no run, left alone outside off expecting a wide, but Dockrell gets away with it

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 2 runs, brilliant effort down at third man from Curtis Campher! Saves two runs! This is short an
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 2 runs, brilliant effort down at third man from Curtis Campher! Saves two runs! This is short and wide, and Williamson climbs on top of it nicely as he cuts it past backward point. It races across the fast outfield but Campher catches up with a desperate dive. Superb effort

short_text: McCarthy to Conway, 1 run, slower length ball outside off, steered down to third man
full_text: McCarthy to Conway, 1 run, slower length ball outside off, steered down to third man

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Williamson punches it to sweeper cover
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 1 run, back of a length outside off, Williamson punches it to sweeper cover

short_text: McCarthy to Conway, 1 run, quite full around middle, Conway squeezes it to mid-off
full_text: McCarthy to Conway, 1 run, quite full around middle, Conway squeezes it to mid-off

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 1 run, full around middle and leg, Williamson flicks it through midwicket
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, 1 run, full around middle and leg, Williamson flicks it through midwicket

short_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , Williamson goes over extra cover! The pressure was building and the New Zealand captain respon
full_text: McCarthy to Williamson, , Williamson goes over extra cover! The pressure was building and the New Zealand captain responds with an attacking shot. It's a full delivery outside off, Williamson gets under it nicely and deliberately hits it in the air. Doesn't quite time it perfectly but it's enough

short_text: Delany to Conway, no run, Conway was initially looking for the sweep but the line was slightly wide outside off, so he a
full_text: Delany to Conway, no run, Conway was initially looking for the sweep but the line was slightly wide outside off, so he adjusts and dabs to short third

short_text: Delany to Williamson, 1 run, flat length ball on middle, Williamson clips it through midwicket
full_text: Delany to Williamson, 1 run, flat length ball on middle, Williamson clips it through midwicket

short_text: Delany to Conway, 1 run, dances down, gets the width he needs for the lofted shot over extra cover that he's looking for
full_text: Delany to Conway, 1 run, dances down, gets the width he needs for the lofted shot over extra cover that he's looking for but ends up driving it straight to long-off

short_text: Delany to Williamson, 1 run, a googly spinning into the pads, Williamson clips it to deep backward square
full_text: Delany to Williamson, 1 run, a googly spinning into the pads, Williamson clips it to deep backward square

short_text: Delany to Williamson, no run, pushed through flat on a length, Williamson turns it to midwicket
full_text: Delany to Williamson, no run, pushed through flat on a length, Williamson turns it to midwicket

short_text: Delany to Williamson, no run, 95kph full delivery drifting in on leg, Williamson looks to sweep but is hit on the pad
full_text: Delany to Williamson, no run, 95kph full delivery drifting in on leg, Williamson looks to sweep but is hit on the pad

short_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, 1 run, Williamson advances and almost turns it into a yorker, having to then squeeze it toward
full_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, 1 run, Williamson advances and almost turns it into a yorker, having to then squeeze it towards mid-on

short_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 1 run, overpitched outside off, driven to long-off
full_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 1 run, overpitched outside off, driven to long-off

short_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, no run, Conway makes room but Hand follows him and restricts him to a defensive nudge to cover
full_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, no run, Conway makes room but Hand follows him and restricts him to a defensive nudge to cover

short_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, 1 run, good length on off, Williamson nudges it wide of mid-on
full_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, 1 run, good length on off, Williamson nudges it wide of mid-on

short_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, no run, full delivery slanted in, Williamson defends into the on-side
full_text: Fionn Hand to Williamson, no run, full delivery slanted in, Williamson defends into the on-side

short_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 1 run, good length across off, Conway knocks it through the covers
full_text: Fionn Hand to Conway, 1 run, good length across off, Conway knocks it through the covers

short_text: Mark Adair to Williamson, no run, good length delivery just outside off, Williamson looks to defend but is beaten on the
full_text: Mark Adair to Williamson, no run, good length delivery just outside off, Williamson looks to defend but is beaten on the edge

short_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, Caught by Fionn Hand!! Oh he's gone! Adair has the last laugh after taking some punishment in
full_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, Caught by Fionn Hand!! Oh he's gone! Adair has the last laugh after taking some punishment in the over. It's a full delivery outside off, and Allen goes after it again. He doesn't quite get under it though, hitting it flat and hard but straight to mid-off. Good hands from Fionn Hand. It was travelling quickly but he hangs onto it.

short_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, , slower leg-cutter just outside off, and Allen thumps it down the ground for another boundary
full_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, , slower leg-cutter just outside off, and Allen thumps it down the ground for another boundary! Adair kicks the ground in disgust. 16 off the over already with a couple of balls to go

short_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, , walks across the stumps, gets inside the line of a short ball and pulls it away over short f
full_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, , walks across the stumps, gets inside the line of a short ball and pulls it away over short fine. It's gone all the way

short_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, , Allen comes charging down, Adair slips in a slower ball and bowls it quite wide to keep it o
full_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, , Allen comes charging down, Adair slips in a slower ball and bowls it quite wide to keep it out of reach. But he fails to keep it within the marker

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, 1 run, fuller than a length across off, Conway steers it through point to the fielder in the deep
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, 1 run, fuller than a length across off, Conway steers it through point to the fielder in the deep

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, , short of length around the waist, and it's pulled away imperiously behind square from Conway who
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, , short of length around the waist, and it's pulled away imperiously behind square from Conway who finally gets one right off the middle. Seemed like a deliberately off-pace delivery and it just sat up beautifully

short_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, , pitched up in the slot outside off, and Allen swings hard to hammer it over mid-off
full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, , pitched up in the slot outside off, and Allen swings hard to hammer it over mid-off

short_text: Joshua Little to Conway, leg byes, 1 run, full delivery slanted in on leg, it's there to be hit but Conway is late on hi
full_text: Joshua Little to Conway, leg byes, 1 run, full delivery slanted in on leg, it's there to be hit but Conway is late on his attempted pick-up shot. Goes off his pad through square leg. Conway looking very scratchy in the middle

short_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, leg byes, 1 run, slower one dug in on a short of length, deceives Allen who's through the p
full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, leg byes, 1 run, slower one dug in on a short of length, deceives Allen who's through the pull early. It goes off his thigh pad into the off-side

short_text: Joshua Little to Conway, 1 run, good length on leg, following Conway as he skips down the pitch. Realising that he won't
full_text: Joshua Little to Conway, 1 run, good length on leg, following Conway as he skips down the pitch. Realising that he won't be able to free the arms, Conway taps it wide of mid-off

short_text: Joshua Little to Conway, no run, fuller than a length around off, Conway defends forward
full_text: Joshua Little to Conway, no run, fuller than a length around off, Conway defends forward

short_text: Joshua Little to Conway, no run, short of length just outside off, patted to backward point
full_text: Joshua Little to Conway, no run, short of length just outside off, patted to backward point

short_text: Delany to Finn Allen, no run, again back of a length outside off, this time Allen flat-bats it along the ground to cover
full_text: Delany to Finn Allen, no run, again back of a length outside off, this time Allen flat-bats it along the ground to cover

short_text: Delany to Finn Allen, , now he goes over the off-side! Makes room for himself and is able to free the arms as Delany pus
full_text: Delany to Finn Allen, , now he goes over the off-side! Makes room for himself and is able to free the arms as Delany pushes it flat on a back of a length

short_text: Delany to Finn Allen, , , beats long-on! Allen backs away, and this isn't a bad idea from Delany to follow him. Even man
full_text: Delany to Finn Allen, , , beats long-on! Allen backs away, and this isn't a bad idea from Delany to follow him. Even manages to cramp him slightly but Allen still gets it away

short_text: Delany to Finn Allen, no run, length ball turning away from off, Allen cuts it to cover-point
full_text: Delany to Finn Allen, no run, length ball turning away from off, Allen cuts it to cover-point

short_text: Delany to Finn Allen, , oh he just manages to beat mid-off! Comes dancing down and drives in the air. Mid-off is quite w
full_text: Delany to Finn Allen, , oh he just manages to beat mid-off! Comes dancing down and drives in the air. Mid-off is quite wide there, and Allen gets it straight enough. It was at catching height if the fielder was just a few yards to his right

short_text: Delany to Conway, 1 run, 94kph, full delivery around off, and Conway flicks it to deep midwicket
full_text: Delany to Conway, 1 run, 94kph, full delivery around off, and Conway flicks it to deep midwicket

short_text: McCarthy to Finn Allen, 2 runs, ! These two openers are desperate to break free after a sedate start. Allen skips down t
full_text: McCarthy to Finn Allen, 2 runs, ! These two openers are desperate to break free after a sedate start. Allen skips down the pitch and tries flat-batting this length ball down the ground, but it comes right off the bottom of his bat. Still manages to get it over the infield

short_text: McCarthy to Conway, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Conway tries clipping it away but is late on it. Goes off
full_text: McCarthy to Conway, leg byes, 1 run, back of a length on leg, Conway tries clipping it away but is late on it. Goes off the thigh pad wide of point

short_text: McCarthy to Conway, no run, good length outside off, Conway looks to cut but is beaten again
full_text: McCarthy to Conway, no run, good length outside off, Conway looks to cut but is beaten again

short_text: McCarthy to Conway, no run, good length outside off, Conway advances and throws his hands at it but misses
full_text: McCarthy to Conway, no run, good length outside off, Conway advances and throws his hands at it but misses

short_text: McCarthy to Finn Allen, 1 run, overpitched just outside off, Allen looks to hoick it away but drags it off the inside ha
full_text: McCarthy to Finn Allen, 1 run, overpitched just outside off, Allen looks to hoick it away but drags it off the inside half through midwicket

short_text: McCarthy to Conway, 1 run, full delivery around off, Conway knocks it to mid-off and sets off for a quick single
full_text: McCarthy to Conway, 1 run, full delivery around off, Conway knocks it to mid-off and sets off for a quick single

short_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, no run, looks to pull but misses
full_text: Mark Adair to Finn Allen, no run, looks to pull but misses

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, 3 runs, ! Not the most straightforward catch for Tector there and down it goes. This was hit very
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, 3 runs, ! Not the most straightforward catch for Tector there and down it goes. This was hit very powerfully. Conway comes down the track, gets a full delivery and hammers it flat down the ground. It goes quickly to the left of Tector who moves across, tries a reverse-cup but it bursts through

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, no run, full delivery on leg stump, and Conway misses out! He's late on the flick and is struck on
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, no run, full delivery on leg stump, and Conway misses out! He's late on the flick and is struck on the pad

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, no run, full and wide outside off, Conway reaches out, drives firmly but straight to cover
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, no run, full and wide outside off, Conway reaches out, drives firmly but straight to cover

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, no run, much better. Good length delivery across off stump, Conway shoulders arms and lets it go t
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, no run, much better. Good length delivery across off stump, Conway shoulders arms and lets it go to the keeper

short_text: Mark Adair to Conway, leg byes, , that's a dreadful delivery to start from Adair. He was very expensive in the game agai
full_text: Mark Adair to Conway, leg byes, , that's a dreadful delivery to start from Adair. He was very expensive in the game against Australia and hasn't started well here. This is full down the leg-side, Conway fails to get bat on it but it runs away to the boundary off his pad

short_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, 2 runs, back of a length at the stumps, Allen looks to pull and drags it off a thick under-
full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, 2 runs, back of a length at the stumps, Allen looks to pull and drags it off a thick under-edge past short fine. He ambles back for two

short_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, no run, good length delivery outside off, Allen goes after it but is beaten on the edge
full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, no run, good length delivery outside off, Allen goes after it but is beaten on the edge

short_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, no run, back of a length outside off, there's width on offer to free the arms and Allen sla
full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, no run, back of a length outside off, there's width on offer to free the arms and Allen slaps it hard but it's straight to cover-point

short_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, no run, short of length across off, Allen looks to punch off the back foot but doesn't quit
full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, no run, short of length across off, Allen looks to punch off the back foot but doesn't quite get on top of the bounce and mistimes it to cover

short_text: Joshua Little to Conway, 1 run, half-volley on the pads, Conway flicks it straight to deep square leg
full_text: Joshua Little to Conway, 1 run, half-volley on the pads, Conway flicks it straight to deep square leg

full_text: Joshua Little to Finn Allen, 1 run, short of length around the waist, Allen pulls it to deep backward square

full_text: Southee to Joshua Little, 1 run, , fuller length delivery outside off, drilled down to long-off for a single

short_text: Southee to Joshua Little, no run, on a good length and following Little as he shuffled across, was looking to lap and wa
full_text: Southee to Joshua Little, no run, on a good length and following Little as he shuffled across, was looking to lap and was on his back as he missed

short_text: Southee to Joshua Little, , , they might not win, but they're making a small dent into NZ's NRR - lengthy ball at the st
full_text: Southee to Joshua Little, , , they might not win, but they're making a small dent into NZ's NRR - lengthy ball at the stumps, Little cleared his left leg and heaved it into the stands, wide of mid-wicket

short_text: Southee to McCarthy, 1 run, length ball wide of off, carted down towards long-off where Ferguson doesn't pick it up, tak
full_text: Southee to McCarthy, 1 run, length ball wide of off, carted down towards long-off where Ferguson doesn't pick it up, takes the ball on the bounce

short_text: Southee to Joshua Little, 1 run, on a good length and just outside off, driven to the right of mid-off for a single
full_text: Southee to Joshua Little, 1 run, on a good length and just outside off, driven to the right of mid-off for a single

short_text: Southee to Mark Adair, Caught by Glenn Phillips!! Southee has a second, was the slower off-cutter, rolled his fingers ac
full_text: Southee to Mark Adair, Caught by Glenn Phillips!! Southee has a second, was the slower off-cutter, rolled his fingers across the seam, Adair had to reach out on the slog, doesn't get enough power on the shot, high and down into the hands of Phillips at long-on. The end is nigh for Ireland, but they're going down fighting.

short_text: Boult to Mark Adair, leg byes, 1 run, full and at the pads, Adair was backing away on the swing and missed, lobbed off t
full_text: Boult to Mark Adair, leg byes, 1 run, full and at the pads, Adair was backing away on the swing and missed, lobbed off the pad and rolled to the on-side

short_text: Boult to Mark Adair, 2 runs, on a good length and well outside off, Adair drags the shovel wide of mid-wicket and comes
full_text: Boult to Mark Adair, 2 runs, on a good length and well outside off, Adair drags the shovel wide of mid-wicket and comes back for the second

short_text: Boult to McCarthy, 1 run, slower short ball outside off, McCarthy fore-hands the slap to mid-off for a quick single
full_text: Boult to McCarthy, 1 run, slower short ball outside off, McCarthy fore-hands the slap to mid-off for a quick single

short_text: Boult to McCarthy, 2 runs, fuller length delivery on off, driven down towards long-on and they scamper back for the seco
full_text: Boult to McCarthy, 2 runs, fuller length delivery on off, driven down towards long-on and they scamper back for the second

full_text: Boult to Mark Adair, 1 run, banged in short and at the stumps, Adair backed away and then skied the pull towards deep mid-wicket, dropped well in front of the fielder

short_text: Boult to McCarthy, 1 run, yorker length delivery on off, McCarthy was coming down the pitch, almost yorked himself and s
full_text: Boult to McCarthy, 1 run, yorker length delivery on off, McCarthy was coming down the pitch, almost yorked himself and squeezed it out to backward point

short_text: Ferguson to McCarthy, 1 run, low full-toss outside off, McCarthy runs it down towards third man for a single
full_text: Ferguson to McCarthy, 1 run, low full-toss outside off, McCarthy runs it down towards third man for a single

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, Caught by Williamson!! Another catch and it's KW at extra-cover - full and straight from Ferguson,
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, Caught by Williamson!! Another catch and it's KW at extra-cover - full and straight from Ferguson, was the knuckle ball - Dockrell was backing away on the inside out drive, the bat turned slghtly on impact and he ended up slicing it into the hands of the New Zealand captain.

short_text: Ferguson to Mark Adair, 1 run, on a good length and at the stumps, Hand backs away and hacks the drive to long-on for a
full_text: Ferguson to Mark Adair, 1 run, on a good length and at the stumps, Hand backs away and hacks the drive to long-on for a single

short_text: Ferguson to Fionn Hand, Caught&Bowled!! Ferguson calls for the catch and he takes the catch himself, Ireland have lost t
full_text: Ferguson to Fionn Hand, Caught&Bowled!! Ferguson calls for the catch and he takes the catch himself, Ireland have lost their 7th wicket. Sheer pace and that undid Hand's attempted pull, rushed onto his pull, gets a steepling top-edge that went straight up - Conway came running forward, but it was Ferguson's call and he held on.

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 1 run, Ferguson goes full and outside off as Dockrell shuffled across his stumps, nudged towards m
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 1 run, Ferguson goes full and outside off as Dockrell shuffled across his stumps, nudged towards mid-on for a single

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, , , good start to the over from Dockrell once again - backs away to a short ball, opens up the off
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, , , good start to the over from Dockrell once again - backs away to a short ball, opens up the off-side and clatters the drive through extra-cover

short_text: Southee to Fionn Hand, , , on a good length and just outside off - Hand gets under and then thumps the drive over extra-
full_text: Southee to Fionn Hand, , , on a good length and just outside off - Hand gets under and then thumps the drive over extra-cover, bounces away to the ropes, was the off-cutter, but was right in the slot

short_text: Southee to Dockrell, 1 run, slower short ball outside off - Dockrell backs away and clatters the cut to deep cover for a
full_text: Southee to Dockrell, 1 run, slower short ball outside off - Dockrell backs away and clatters the cut to deep cover for a single

short_text: Southee to Fionn Hand, 1 run, full and at the stumps, driven past mid-on for a single
full_text: Southee to Fionn Hand, 1 run, full and at the stumps, driven past mid-on for a single

short_text: Southee to Campher, Caught by Finn Allen!! The wheels are falling off Ireland - Campher ran down the pitch, but got a ta
full_text: Southee to Campher, Caught by Finn Allen!! The wheels are falling off Ireland - Campher ran down the pitch, but got a tad too close to the ball, doesn't get the power or the elevation on the drive, straight into the hands of Allen at mid-off.

short_text: Southee to Dockrell, 1 run, on a good length and at the stumps, Dockrell backs away and works it wide of cover for a sin
full_text: Southee to Dockrell, 1 run, on a good length and at the stumps, Dockrell backs away and works it wide of cover for a single

full_text: Southee to Campher, 1 run, slower short ball outside off, slapped away square on the off-side for a single

full_text: Boult to Dockrell, , , wide half-volley from Boult, Dockrell climbs into the drive and goes over extra-cover with a free-flowing drive, one bounce and over the ropes,

short_text: Boult to Dockrell, , poor ball from Boult, short and wide of off - Dockrell threw himself on the drive, gets a toe-end a
full_text: Boult to Dockrell, , poor ball from Boult, short and wide of off - Dockrell threw himself on the drive, gets a toe-end and it runs away past the fielder in the ring at third man

short_text: Boult to Dockrell, 2 runs, very full and just outside off, Dockrell squeezes it in front of square on the on-side, comes
full_text: Boult to Dockrell, 2 runs, very full and just outside off, Dockrell squeezes it in front of square on the on-side, comes back for the second

short_text: Boult to Campher, 1 run, short of a good length and just outside off, chopped away without any timing to the off-side
full_text: Boult to Campher, 1 run, short of a good length and just outside off, chopped away without any timing to the off-side

full_text: Boult to Campher, no run, on a good length and angling across the right-hander, Campher was shaping for the reverse lap and missed

short_text: Boult to Campher, , . good start from Campher - short and wide of off, he threw his bat on the cut, gets enough to clear
full_text: Boult to Campher, , . good start from Campher - short and wide of off, he threw his bat on the cut, gets enough to clear short third man and bounces away to the ropes

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Campher, 1 run, slower and wider of off, Campher goes hard on the drive and chops it to backward point for
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Campher, 1 run, slower and wider of off, Campher goes hard on the drive and chops it to backward point for a single

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Campher, no run, Campher brings out the reverse sweep first-ball, but can't beat backward point
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Campher, no run, Campher brings out the reverse sweep first-ball, but can't beat backward point

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, Caught by Finn Allen!! Catching practice at long-off! Nicely tossed up outside off, Tucker came dow
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, Caught by Finn Allen!! Catching practice at long-off! Nicely tossed up outside off, Tucker came down the pitch, was looking to go inside out with the lofted drive, but he doesn't get the elevation nor the placement, hit it a lot straighter and down Allen's throat at long-off.

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, crunched, but there's Phillips in the deep and he keeps them down to a couple, tossed up sl
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, crunched, but there's Phillips in the deep and he keeps them down to a couple, tossed up slower and well outside off - Tucker shuffled across and slugged it to the on-side

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Dockrell, 1 run, the wrong 'un, but the length is short and it's pushed square past point for a single, bri
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Dockrell, 1 run, the wrong 'un, but the length is short and it's pushed square past point for a single, brings up

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Dockrell, no run, flighted delivery on off, Dockrell comes down the pitch and pushes it back at the bowler
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Dockrell, no run, flighted delivery on off, Dockrell comes down the pitch and pushes it back at the bowler

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 1 run, a heave, a top-edge and the ball bounces wide of third man, Santner gets across to his left
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 1 run, a heave, a top-edge and the ball bounces wide of third man, Santner gets across to his left and keeps them down to a single

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 2 runs, short of a length and well wide of off, steered behind square on the off-side, comes back
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 2 runs, short of a length and well wide of off, steered behind square on the off-side, comes back for the second run

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, no run, Ferguson shortens the length around off, Dockrell hops across and jabs it to backward poin
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, no run, Ferguson shortens the length around off, Dockrell hops across and jabs it to backward point

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 2 runs, back of a length and just outside off, Dockrell uses Ferguson's pace and steers it backwar
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, 2 runs, back of a length and just outside off, Dockrell uses Ferguson's pace and steers it backward of square on the off-side, scampers back for the second

short_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, no run, on a good length and just outside off, drags Dockrell forward into the drive and beats him
full_text: Ferguson to Dockrell, no run, on a good length and just outside off, drags Dockrell forward into the drive and beats him on the outside edge

short_text: Ferguson to Delany, Caught by Conway!! Edged and caught! Pace back on and Delany was looking to take on the bowler - but
full_text: Ferguson to Delany, Caught by Conway!! Edged and caught! Pace back on and Delany was looking to take on the bowler - but Ferguson smartly took some pace off this delivery with the leg-cutter, was pretty wide and Delany had to reach out on the cut, gets a thick edge and Conway completes a smart catch, moving across to his right. Ireloand slip further in this tall chase.

short_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, another shout for a stumping and the . No bat and we'll go for the stumping check now - Tucke
full_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, another shout for a stumping and the . No bat and we'll go for the stumping check now - Tucker has dragged his foot back in time and will be NOT OUT - slower and just outside off, Tucker was shaping for the slog sweep and missed, the momentum dragged him out of the crease, but he did get it back in time

short_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, Tucker goes for the reverse sweep - but the drift and then the turn outfoxes him, past the ed
full_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, Tucker goes for the reverse sweep - but the drift and then the turn outfoxes him, past the edge and he hurries back to his crease

short_text: Santner to Delany, 1 run, very slow from Santner, Delany was early into the pull and drags it behind square on the on-si
full_text: Santner to Delany, 1 run, very slow from Santner, Delany was early into the pull and drags it behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Santner to Delany, , , flighted delivery on off, Delany gets forward and then thumps it over cover, has enough to run aw
full_text: Santner to Delany, , , flighted delivery on off, Delany gets forward and then thumps it over cover, has enough to run away to the ropes

short_text: Santner to Delany, no run, , nicely tossed up on middle, gripped and turned off the surface, Delany is way too early int
full_text: Santner to Delany, no run, , nicely tossed up on middle, gripped and turned off the surface, Delany is way too early into the drive and missed

short_text: Santner to Delany, no run, this is such good bowling, slowed down the pace and drifted it away from outside off - Delany
full_text: Santner to Delany, no run, this is such good bowling, slowed down the pace and drifted it away from outside off - Delany was through with the shot early and missed

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, the inside edge now, , shuffled right across on the slog-sweep, gets an inside edge and nut
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, the inside edge now, , shuffled right across on the slog-sweep, gets an inside edge and nutmegs Conway on its way, back for the second

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, , dropped short and wide of off, Tucker stands tall and crashes it over the man in the ring
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, , dropped short and wide of off, Tucker stands tall and crashes it over the man in the ring, needed a sliding save to prevent the boundary

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Delany, leg byes, 1 run, more spin for Sodhi, was the wrong 'un and it spun down the pitch - Delany was lef
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Delany, leg byes, 1 run, more spin for Sodhi, was the wrong 'un and it spun down the pitch - Delany was left stranded as he came down the pitch, clipped his pads and that saved him

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, leg byes, 1 run, appeal for LBW, but Tucker was a long way down the pitch, Sodhi saw him coming and
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, leg byes, 1 run, appeal for LBW, but Tucker was a long way down the pitch, Sodhi saw him coming and fired one at the pads, rolled towards square leg for a leg-bye

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, nicely bowled, the wide leg-break, spun away further and catches Tucker's edge on the sweep
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, nicely bowled, the wide leg-break, spun away further and catches Tucker's edge on the sweep, through the vacant slip region for a couple

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, a big top-edge on the slog-sweep, but Tucker has got enough for the ball to land in between
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 2 runs, a big top-edge on the slog-sweep, but Tucker has got enough for the ball to land in between the bowler and long-on, comes back for the second

short_text: Santner to Tucker, 1 run, loopy delivery on middle and leg, Tucker backs away and drives it to long-on for a single
full_text: Santner to Tucker, 1 run, loopy delivery on middle and leg, Tucker backs away and drives it to long-on for a single

short_text: Santner to Delany, 1 run, flighted delivery outside off, chopped away in front of square on the off-side for a single
full_text: Santner to Delany, 1 run, flighted delivery outside off, chopped away in front of square on the off-side for a single

short_text: Santner to Delany, , , much needed boundary for Ireland - dropped short and wide of off, Delany makes room and then cuts
full_text: Santner to Delany, , , much needed boundary for Ireland - dropped short and wide of off, Delany makes room and then cuts it square on the off-side for a boundary

short_text: Santner to Tector, Caught by Southee!! This is top-class bowling from Santner, saw Tector shuffle across, bowled it slow
full_text: Santner to Tector, Caught by Southee!! This is top-class bowling from Santner, saw Tector shuffle across, bowled it slower and wider of off, gets it to dip onto Tector's drive, scooped a thick top-edge as Tector reached out on the shot, loops into the hands of Southee, moving to his left at backward point. Classical left-arm orthodox bowling from Santner.

short_text: Santner to Tector, no run, dropped shorter and wider of off, Tector finds backward point with the cut
full_text: Santner to Tector, no run, dropped shorter and wider of off, Tector finds backward point with the cut

short_text: Santner to Tector, no run, slower and a hint of drift and turn from off, pushed to the off-side
full_text: Santner to Tector, no run, slower and a hint of drift and turn from off, pushed to the off-side

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, 1 run, dropped short and well outside off - Tector gets across and pulls it past square leg for a s
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, 1 run, dropped short and well outside off - Tector gets across and pulls it past square leg for a single

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, no run, flighted delivery on off, Tector leans half-forward and finds cover with the drive
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, no run, flighted delivery on off, Tector leans half-forward and finds cover with the drive

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 1 run, nicely tossed up outside off, was the leg-break and Tucker sweeps against the turn, to deep
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tucker, 1 run, nicely tossed up outside off, was the leg-break and Tucker sweeps against the turn, to deep mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, 1 run, flighted well outside off, Tector presses across and then sweeps it behind square on the on-
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, 1 run, flighted well outside off, Tector presses across and then sweeps it behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, no run, tossed up on off, defended back at the bowler
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tector, no run, tossed up on off, defended back at the bowler

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Stirling, Bowled!! They have lost both openers now, spin doing the trick for New Zealand. Sodhi takes the c
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Stirling, Bowled!! They have lost both openers now, spin doing the trick for New Zealand. Sodhi takes the cue from his spin partner, slows down this leg-break, drifts in and then spins away slightly, was the top-spinner and Stirling was way too early into the slog-sweep - the ball curved past the bat and crashes into the top of the off-stump.

short_text: Santner to Stirling, 1 run, Santner drags the length back as Stirling came down the pitch, pushed back past the bowler f
full_text: Santner to Stirling, 1 run, Santner drags the length back as Stirling came down the pitch, pushed back past the bowler for a single

short_text: Santner to Stirling, no run, flighted delivery around middle and off, Stirling backs away on the inside out drive, gets
full_text: Santner to Stirling, no run, flighted delivery around middle and off, Stirling backs away on the inside out drive, gets a thick edge that bounces in front of backward point

short_text: Santner to Tucker, 1 run, Tucker brings out the sweep, shuffles across, rolled his wrists and swept it over square leg f
full_text: Santner to Tucker, 1 run, Tucker brings out the sweep, shuffles across, rolled his wrists and swept it over square leg for a run

short_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, loopy delivery outside off, driven back at the bowler
full_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, loopy delivery outside off, driven back at the bowler

short_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, nicely tossed up on off, Tucker gets half-forward in defence
full_text: Santner to Tucker, no run, nicely tossed up on off, Tucker gets half-forward in defence

short_text: Santner to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Chopped on! Lovely bowling from Santner, slowed down the pace and then got the ball to ha
full_text: Santner to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Chopped on! Lovely bowling from Santner, slowed down the pace and then got the ball to hang in the air, drifted in and then spun away, Balbirnie was making room for the cut, but does so without any conviction, gets an inside edge that bounces onto the stumps. The zing bail lights up and Balbirnie yanks his head away in disappointment. Much needed wicket for New Zealand, the momentum was slowly shifting towards the Irish.

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, 1 run, , flighted delivery outside off, Balbirnie was pushing forward and skews an inside edge p
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, 1 run, , flighted delivery outside off, Balbirnie was pushing forward and skews an inside edge past his leg-stump

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, , , this is exceptional batting from Balbirnie, he's targetting the short square boundary and he
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, , , this is exceptional batting from Balbirnie, he's targetting the short square boundary and he's pounding them at the moment - loopy delivery outside off, Balbirnie reaches out and then nails the slog-sweep over mid-wicket

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, no run, nicely tossed up outside off, Balbirnie can't beat cover with the drive - a tumbling sto
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, no run, nicely tossed up outside off, Balbirnie can't beat cover with the drive - a tumbling stop to his right from KW

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, 2 runs, dropped short and wide of off, chopped away behind square on the off-side and he's back
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, 2 runs, dropped short and wide of off, chopped away behind square on the off-side and he's back for the second

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, no run, pushed through flatter and wider of off, Balbirnie was shaping for the cut and missed
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, no run, pushed through flatter and wider of off, Balbirnie was shaping for the cut and missed

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, , another big effort from  Phillips, but Balbirnie has struck it well to clear his back-dive at
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, , another big effort from  Phillips, but Balbirnie has struck it well to clear his back-dive at deep mid-wicket - floated outside off and Balbirnie went for the big slog-sweep, was to the shorter side and that saved him

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, , loose delivery from Sodhi, slower and wider of off, past the tramlines and is called as a wide
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Balbirnie, , loose delivery from Sodhi, slower and wider of off, past the tramlines and is called as a wide

short_text: Santner to Balbirnie, 1 run, that was a terrific effort from Phillips, but the ball was always dropping short on him - w
full_text: Santner to Balbirnie, 1 run, that was a terrific effort from Phillips, but the ball was always dropping short on him - was slower and wider of off, Balbirnie fetched the sweep and couldn't keep it down, lobbed in the air over mid-wicket - Phillips ran in from the deep, threw himself forward and gets his body behind the line to prevent more runs

short_text: Santner to Balbirnie, no run, pushed through flatter and on the pads, Balbirnie half-bends and swivels the pull to short
full_text: Santner to Balbirnie, no run, pushed through flatter and on the pads, Balbirnie half-bends and swivels the pull to short fine

short_text: Santner to Stirling, 1 run, good comeback from Santner - slows down the pace, throws it wider and makes Stirling reach o
full_text: Santner to Stirling, 1 run, good comeback from Santner - slows down the pace, throws it wider and makes Stirling reach out on the drive, sliced over cover for a single

short_text: Santner to Stirling, , , Stirling doesn't want Santner to settle - gets down low, gets his left leg out of the way and t
full_text: Santner to Stirling, , , Stirling doesn't want Santner to settle - gets down low, gets his left leg out of the way and then sweeps it powerfully, over square leg for a maximum

short_text: Santner to Stirling, , , improvises, brings out the reverse sweep and clears backward point, into the smaller square bou
full_text: Santner to Stirling, , , improvises, brings out the reverse sweep and clears backward point, into the smaller square boundaries and runs away to the ropes

full_text: Santner to Balbirnie, 1 run, tossed up slower and just outside off, driven in front of square on the off-side for a single

full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, 1 run, good length on middle, pushed down to square third-man

full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, no run, full on off, Balbirnie a bit late on his square drive and picks out the fielder

full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, no run, good length and goes just over the stumps as Balbirnie went for a wild slog across the line

full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, no run, full and quick on off, pushed towards mid-off

full_text: Ferguson to Stirling, 1 run, good length on the stumps, Stirling swings behind square but Boult is there to save the boundary

full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, 1 run, back of a length on middle, shoots up a bit. Comes off Balbirnie's bat handle towards point as he tried to defend

short_text: Southee to Stirling, 2 runs, fuller on off, heaved along the ground to the left of deep square leg. Mitchell the fielder
full_text: Southee to Stirling, 2 runs, fuller on off, heaved along the ground to the left of deep square leg. Mitchell the fielder who makes a smart, diving stop and saves a couple of runs

short_text: Southee to Stirling, no run, length ball that bounces over leg stump as Stirling shuffles away to try and swing, but mis
full_text: Southee to Stirling, no run, length ball that bounces over leg stump as Stirling shuffles away to try and swing, but misses

short_text: Southee to Stirling, , pace off length ball on the pads, Stirling clears his legs once again and slaps it behind square.
full_text: Southee to Stirling, , pace off length ball on the pads, Stirling clears his legs once again and slaps it behind square. This time much more powerfully to pick up a boundary

full_text: Southee to Balbirnie, 1 run, good length outside off, punched down to the deep point fielder

full_text: Southee to Stirling, 1 run, pace off length ball on the pads, Stirling decides late to just tap it towards mid-wicket for a run

short_text: Southee to Stirling, 2 runs, full on middle, driven to the left of deep square leg for a couple
full_text: Southee to Stirling, 2 runs, full on middle, driven to the left of deep square leg for a couple

short_text: Ferguson to Stirling, 3 runs, full and straight, driven straight over the bowler's head. The timing isn't good enough fo
full_text: Ferguson to Stirling, 3 runs, full and straight, driven straight over the bowler's head. The timing isn't good enough for four, as mid-on comes runs back to save a run

short_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, 1 run, on a length outside off, run down to third-man again
full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, 1 run, on a length outside off, run down to third-man again

full_text: Ferguson to Balbirnie, 2 runs, short outside off, dabbed down to third-man. Glenn Phillips the man who covers ground very quickly to his left

short_text: Ferguson to Stirling, 1 run, fuller on off, Stirling shuffles closer to heave this towards deep square leg. There is a f
full_text: Ferguson to Stirling, 1 run, fuller on off, Stirling shuffles closer to heave this towards deep square leg. There is a fielder there so just a single

short_text: Ferguson to Stirling, no run, nice wide yorker and Stirling can't reach till the ball
full_text: Ferguson to Stirling, no run, nice wide yorker and Stirling can't reach till the ball

short_text: Ferguson to Stirling, no run, length ball that fizzes over the stumps. A swing and a miss for Stirling who looked to slo
full_text: Ferguson to Stirling, no run, length ball that fizzes over the stumps. A swing and a miss for Stirling who looked to slog it over mid-wicket

short_text: Boult to Stirling, 1 run, short on the body, pulled to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Boult to Stirling, 1 run, short on the body, pulled to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Boult to Stirling, , wide and full outside off, Stirling really reaches for it and slices it over point for a boundary

short_text: Boult to Stirling, 2 runs, length ball on off, slapped towards cow corner but there is protection in that region. Stirli
full_text: Boult to Stirling, 2 runs, length ball on off, slapped towards cow corner but there is protection in that region. Stirling a bit casual with his second run, almost cost him there!

short_text: Boult to Stirling, 2 runs, slower ball that was pitched up, Stirling lifts it high over the bowler's head. Just clears t
full_text: Boult to Stirling, 2 runs, slower ball that was pitched up, Stirling lifts it high over the bowler's head. Just clears the infield where Williamson was running back from mid-off. Couple of runs taken

short_text: Boult to Stirling, no run, full on off, driven hard but straight to mid-off. Another dot ball
full_text: Boult to Stirling, no run, full on off, driven hard but straight to mid-off. Another dot ball

short_text: Boult to Stirling, no run, fuller outside off, Stirling clesrs his front leg for a big heave but can't connect properly.
full_text: Boult to Stirling, no run, fuller outside off, Stirling clesrs his front leg for a big heave but can't connect properly. Cuts it into the pitch and back to the bowler

short_text: Southee to Stirling, leg byes, 1 run, fuller and strays down the leg side, deflecting off the pads. The keeper only half
full_text: Southee to Stirling, leg byes, 1 run, fuller and strays down the leg side, deflecting off the pads. The keeper only half stops, allowing the batters to cross

short_text: Southee to Stirling, no run, length ball on off, Stirling shuffles inwards to clip in away but can't make any contact. S
full_text: Southee to Stirling, no run, length ball on off, Stirling shuffles inwards to clip in away but can't make any contact. Struck on the pads and Southee is very confident. The umpire feels it's too high. NZ review and Stirling is saved by umpire's call on height. A very marginal call!

full_text: Southee to Balbirnie, 1 run, fuller on off, driven to the left of mid-off for a single

full_text: Southee to Balbirnie, no run, pitched up on off, blocked towards cover point

full_text: Southee to Balbirnie, no run, fuller on off, defended towards point

full_text: Southee to Stirling, 1 run, length ball angling onto leg, Stirling shuffles away and pushes it towards square third-man

short_text: Boult to Balbirnie, , Boult goes short and Balbirnie pounces on it. A pure swing on his pull that is launched well into
full_text: Boult to Balbirnie, , Boult goes short and Balbirnie pounces on it. A pure swing on his pull that is launched well into the stands over deep mid-wicket. Need many more of those today!

short_text: Boult to Balbirnie, no run, on a length on leg, defended to mid-wicket. Balbirnie slips while playing that shot, fortuna
full_text: Boult to Balbirnie, no run, on a length on leg, defended to mid-wicket. Balbirnie slips while playing that shot, fortunate to not fall onto his stumps

full_text: Boult to Balbirnie, no run, fuller and the swing takes the ball to leg stump, pushed towards mid-on

full_text: Boult to Balbirnie, no run, on a length and straight, nipped back in. Balbirnie slightly squared up and gets beaten on the inside edge

full_text: Boult to Stirling, 1 run, fuller on the pads, clipped behind square to get off the mark
